welcome: Web Development Simplified, Secure, and Organized.
heroDescription: Vixt is the Vanilla TS micro-framework built for those who value extreme performance, modular architecture, and security by default.
securityText: Vixt features native VNode sanitization layers and Prototype Pollution protection. Your links, attributes, and states are automatically validated before touching the DOM, preventing XSS and injection attacks by default.
pillarOrgDesc: Native guidance for modular development. Say goodbye to giant files and hello to a directory-per-component structure.
pillarCustomDesc: Standardized components that respect your Design Tokens. Use CSS variables to change everything in seconds.
pillarI18nDesc: Internationalization isn't an extra, it's the core. Switch languages at runtime without page reloads.
roadmapRouter: Native Router: History API-based navigation fully integrated with reactive state.
roadmapAnim: Declarative Animations: Fluid animation system via props, without heavy libraries.
roadmapSSR: Edge Rendering: Specific optimizations for running on Cloudflare Workers and Vercel Edge.
noticeText: Vixt is a young project in constant evolution. Feedbacks, suggestions, and collaborations via GitHub are extremely welcome!
securityNoticeText: While Vixt provides native protection layers, security is not a 'silver bullet'. Developers must maintain best practices and continuous vigilance in their projects.
compDesc: An expanding library of ready-to-use components.
compPrimitivesDesc: Solid base with Typography, Button, and Container. Styling via props and full accessibility support.
compFormsDesc: Smart Inputs, Selects, and FormGroups with native validation and automatic sanitization.
compFeedbackDesc: Inform the user with modern, lightweight Badges, Toasts, and Skeletons.
compNavDesc: Tabs, Breadcrumbs, and Pagination for complex and organized interfaces.
compOverlaysDesc: Create context layers with elegant tooltips, dropdown menus, and modal dialogs.
compDataDesc: Transform raw data into readable information with high-performance Accordions and Tables.
